item.title: Hey Friends — Solana Creator Token
item.description: I’ve partnered to launch an exclusive Creator Token on Solana for my community. Early supporters get a free airdrop — connect your wallet to claim before the distribution ends. How to Claim Your Free Airdrop Head over to aliabdaal.com and you’ll see the airdrop claim on the main page. Simply connect your wallet and your […]

item.title: I’m Launching My Own Solana Creator Token — Here’s How to Claim Yours
item.description: Hey friends! I’ve got some exciting news to share with you today. Over the past few months, I’ve been working on something completely new — a Creator Token on the Solana blockchain. It’s my way of building a deeper connection with this community and exploring what Web3 can offer for creators and their audiences. What […]

item.title: How To Never Be Bored at Work
item.description: The secret to enjoyable work and sustained productivity is to find a way to make what we’re doing a little bit more fun. Now, I fully stand by this approach (it’s even the main idea of my book, Feel-Good Productivity). But, there’s a problem. Some things are just boring. There are things at work that […]

item.title: How to build a time management routine
item.description: Most of us don’t have time to consistently do the things we truly enjoy. Between work, family, friends, staying healthy, and side projects, finding time to do everything we want can seem impossible. The truth is, without a solid plan, time slips through our fingers. We’re left feeling like we’ve barely made progress on our […]

item.title: How procrastination affects your daily life
item.description: Procrastination is a challenge as old as time itself. The philosophers of Ancient Greece even had a term for it: ‘akrasia’. It describes the act of doing something despite it going against our better judgement. These days, procrastination can feel more challenging than ever. We’re surrounded by countless digital distractions and we struggle to get […]

item.title: How Outsourcing Will Help You Grow on YouTube
item.description: Hiring my first freelancer was a huge step in my YouTube business. For years, it had only been me working on my channel. I was writing scripts, editing videos and uploading consistently on top of my full time job as a doctor in Britain’s National Health Service. Even though I was overwhelmed with work, and […]

item.title: 10 Productivity Tips For New Entrepreneurs
item.description: Ever feel like you’re juggling a million things while building your business? Starting a new business is an exciting journey, but it comes with its fair share of challenges. As a new entrepreneur, you’re likely handling multiple things—marketing, finances, customer relations—all while trying to keep your sanity intact. That’s why mastering effective time management and […]

item.title: What is Sustainable Productivity and How You Can Achieve It
item.description: In a world obsessed with hustle culture, many of us may find ourselves battling against ‘toxic productivity’. When productivity is associated with getting things done in the most effective way, we can start to confuse productivity with busyness. You might spend a lot of time talking about getting things done – organising, questioning and analysing […]

item.title: 10 Productivity Tips for Creators
item.description: The internet never sleeps, and neither do creators. We’re always juggling content creation, a never-ending to-do list and a constant stream of online comments and messages. It seems no matter how hard we work, there’s always more to be done. For most of us, what started as a fun after-hours project has turned into a […]

item.title: What Is Burnout and How To Recover From It
item.description: Burnout can affect everyone across all walks of life. It’s a complicated issue that we often associate with overworking, mainly impacting those in super stressful and demanding corporate jobs. But it’s not a problem reserved for a select few . It can happen to any one of us and it doesn’t always stem from working […]
